headline: Dover Fueling Solutions Launches ProGauge DMP MagRF to Transform Wired Probes into Wireless Connectivity for Retail and Industrial Fueling Operations
summary: Dover Fueling Solutions ("DFS"), a part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global provider of advanced customer-focused technologies, services and solutions in the fuel and convenience retail industries, today announced the launch of the ProGauge® DMP™ MagRF, delivering enhanced wireless connectivity for ProGauge® DMP™ Magnetostrictive probes and ProGauge® DMP Flex™ Magnetostrictive probes (formerly branded DFS DMP™).

headline: TSA Staffing Crisis Could Close Airports — How To Fly Your Portfolio To Safety
summary: TSA warns that some U.S. airports might need to be closed due to the ongoing staffing crisis. Here's how to protect your portfolio.
